name: HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_TL
description:
This table will be used to store information regarding the Questions being
used in the Survey- TL version of HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_B.

primary_keys.name: HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_TL_PK
primary_keys.columns: SUBSCRIBER_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_VERSION, LANGUAGE

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Subscriber ID associated with the Survey. Used to differentiate between different survey projects.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the Questionnaire in the specified language.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Question ID associated with the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: QUESTION_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Question Version associated with the Question ID.

columns.Name: QUESTION_TEXT
columns.Comments: This is the text of the Question in the specified language.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: SUBSCRIBER_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_VERSION, LANGUAGE
